data.Modification: Iodoacetamide derivative/Addition of Glycine/Addition of G

project.title: TFT3 interacts with MAPKKK by coimmunoprecipitation
project.projectDescription: Tomato MAPKKK interacts with the N. benthamiana homologue of TFT3. MAPKKK-HA was transiently expressed in N. benthamiana leaves and immunoprecipitated using -HA agarose beads. 12 unique peptides of N. benthamiana TFT3 homologue were identified by liquid chromatography–mass spectrometry.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: Ustun S, Sheikh A, Gimenez-Ibanez S, Jones A, Ntoukakis V, Bornke F. The Proteasome Acts as a Hub for Plant Immunity and Is Targeted by Pseudomonas Type III Effectors. Plant Physiol 172, 1941-1958 (2016).
project.dataProcessingProtocol: Ustun S, Sheikh A, Gimenez-Ibanez S, Jones A, Ntoukakis V, Bornke F. The Proteasome Acts as a Hub for Plant Immunity and Is Targeted by Pseudomonas Type III Effectors. Plant Physiol 172, 1941-1958 (2016).

references.referenceLine: Sheikh AH, Zacharia I, Pardal AJ, Dominguez-Ferreras A, Sueldo DJ, Kim JG, Balmuth A, Gutierrez JR, Conlan BF, Ullah N, Nippe OM, Girija AM, Wu CH, Sessa G, Jones AME, Grant MR, Gifford ML, Mudgett MB, Rathjen JP, Ntoukakis V. Dynamic changes of the Prf/Pto tomato resistance complex following effector recognition. Nat Commun. 2023 14(1):2568

Characteristics[GeneticModification]: N-terminal-deleted autoactive version of MAPKKKα (Supplementary Fig. 3)
Comment[Instrument]: Thermo Orbitrap Fusion mass spectrometer (Q-OT-qIT; Thermo Scientific)
Comment[Separation]: Reverse-phase chromatography was used to separate tryptic peptides prior to mass spectrometric analysis.
Comment[FragmentMassTolerance]: product ions were searched at 0.8-D tolerance.
Comment[NumberOfMissedCleavages]: with up to two missed cleavages
